description: claude-claw hooks - checks gateway daemon status on session start

hooks.command: bash -c 'STATUS=$(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:19789/api/status 2>/dev/null); if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then ADAPTERS=$(echo $STATUS | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(\":\".join(d.get(\"adapters\",[]))or\"none\")" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown"); echo "[claw] Gateway running (adapters: $ADAPTERS)"; else echo "[claw] Gateway not running - use /claw-start"; fi'
